description_long: This rifle features a compact bullpup configuration with a distinctive integrated stock and a prominent thumbhole grip. The body is primarily matte black, with a smooth, streamlined exterior and a visible upper rail system for mounting optics. The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the main body, and the magazine is not externally visible, suggesting it is housed within the stock. The rifle includes a raised sight mount, likely for attaching scopes or other aiming devices. The overall design is modern and tactical, with ergonomic cutouts and a robust, utilitarian appearance. The materials appear to be a combination of metal for the barrel and internal components, and high-strength polymer for the body and stock.
description: A modern, compact bullpup rifle with a matte black finish, integrated stock, and a long barrel. Features a raised sight mount and ergonomic grip cutouts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the thumbhole grip, integrated stock, and the extended barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the sight mount above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same ergonomic features and barrel extension.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the compact width of the rifle.
